events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, critical risk. Frayed/burned webbing on a fall protection component is load-bearing fiber damage that OSHA 1910.140/1926 Subpart M require to trigger immediate removal from service — it can't pass as roughed-in, and no further use is permitted until the webbing is replaced and the system re-inspected.
